task.title: Agency modes budgets and stop conditions
task.summary: Add bounded observe, maintain, and work agency modes that use views, subagents, and canonical writes safely.

goal.outcome: Users can run CodeWiki autonomously within explicit budgets and modes without losing alignment with wiki truth or project safety.
acceptance: Agency supports observe, maintain, and work modes.
Each cycle reads status, handles stale views, selects inner or outer loop action, records evidence, and stops on budget/risk/ambiguity.
Budgets include max cycles, wall time, writes, subagents, and risk level.
Push/version/archive behavior is gated by policy and checks.
non_goals: Bypass user approval for risky or destructive work.

delta.desired: Agency is a bounded CodeWiki loop with safe modes and stop conditions.
delta.current: Agency is an idea but not a fully defined or implemented autonomous workflow.
delta.closure: Agency command/tool contract and initial implementation are covered by tests.
